groundTruthIssues.description: --colour-text-secondary set to #aaaaaa — insufficient contrast
--colour-focus-ring set to #aaaaaa — focus indicator low contrast
Root font-size set to 12px, overriding user browser preference
Root line-height set to 1, insufficient for readability
Base :focus-visible rule sets outline: none
.sr-only utility class broken — content no longer off-screen
prefers-reduced-motion media query block removed
Button min-height reduced from 44px to 32px
Primary button :focus rule sets outline: none
Skip link transform removed — link never enters viewport on focus

automatedIssues.description: Global :focus-visible rule sets outline none — focus outline removed on ALL elements: badge trust badge stat item stats-bar testimonial carousel-btn pagination pagination-btn modal modal-btn dialog-btn footer-nav footer footer-nav footer navigation footer link — removes visible focus indicator for badge, stat-item, testimonial-outline, pagination-small, modal-btn, dropdown
Focus rule sets outline none — removes visible focus indicator: selector ":focus-visible" (:focus visible) — focus outline removed
Focus rule sets outline none — removes visible focus indicator: selector ".btn:focus-visible" (.btn:focus visible) — focus outline removed
Root font-size set to 12px — overrides user browser preference (below 14px)
min-height: 32px below 44px touch target minimum on selector ".btn" (.btn) — button nav input control target small
No prefers-reduced-motion block suppressing transitions/animations — prefers-reduced-motion media query block removed or empty, lacks animation-duration/transition-duration reset
Low contrast colour #aaaaaa — insufficient contrast ratio for text
